what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record that links an attachment identifier to a board item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML front matter only, with no body content
target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-228f99c7
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
conventions: Uses YAML front matter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
References an external board item via a URI scheme
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp for the added field
concerns: No body or payload content beyond metadata
Target board item is not resolvable from within this file alone
notes: A bare channel attachment metadata stub that points a board_items attachment at board item item-228f99c7.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment actually carry?
What does board item item-228f99c7 represent?
Who or what process added this attachment?
intention_signals: It appears to record that a specific board item is attached to a channel memory entry so the relationship can be looked up later.
contribution: It contributes a persistent attachment-to-board-item mapping with a timestamp for the dragnet-development channel.
summary_for_embedding: This is a metadata-only channel attachment file that maps attachment att-5d1186cc in the dragnet-development channel to board item item-228f99c7.
